# Creative Metal Industries

> Manufacturer, stockist, supplier, importer and exporter of Stainless Steel, Carbon Steel, Alloy Steel, Duplex Steel and Exotic Alloys — Pipes, Tubes, Plates, Sheets, Fittings, Flanges and Valves. Established 2012, Vadodara, Gujarat, India.

## About

Creative Metal Industries is a trusted industrial metal trading company based in Vadodara, Gujarat, India. We supply SS, CS, Alloy Steel, Duplex, Super Duplex, Inconel, Monel, Hastelloy, Titanium, Aluminium and Copper products to Oil & Gas, Petrochemical, Power, Fertilizer, Chemical, Cement, Marine and EPC industries across India and 50+ countries.

- Founded: 2012
- Location: F-3, Loha Bhavan, Lakkadpitha Road, Vadodara 390001, Gujarat, India
- Warehouse: 386/B, GIDC Makarpura, Vadodara
- Phone: +91 99982 80619 (Sunny Shah), +91 98255 06110 (Ghewar Shah)
- Email: creativemetalind@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.creativemetalind.com

## Products

- Stainless Steel Pipes and Tubes (ASTM A312, A213, A269) — SS 304, 304L, 316, 316L, 317L, 321, 310S, 347, 904L
- Duplex and Super Duplex Steel (ASTM A790, A240) — UNS S31803, S32750, S32205
- Alloy Steel Pipes (ASTM A335) — P5, P9, P11, P22, P91, P92 with IBR Form III-C
- Carbon Steel Pipes and Plates (ASTM A106, SA 516, IS 2062, API 5L)
- SS Buttweld Fittings (ASTM A403, A815) — Elbows, Tees, Reducers, ASME B16.9
- Forged Fittings and Flanges (ASTM A182, A105) — ASME B16.5, B16.11
- Plates, Sheets and Coils — SS, CS, Alloy, Hardox, Clad, Corten
- Structural Steel — MS Angles, Channels, Beams, Bars, TMT (IS 2062, IS 808, IS 1786)
- Exotic Alloys — Inconel 600/625/718, Monel 400, Hastelloy C-276/C-22, Titanium Gr.1/2/5

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.creativemetalind.com/): Homepage with full product catalogue and contact form
- [About](https://www.creativemetalind.com/about): Company history, facility, certifications
- [Products](https://www.creativemetalind.com/products): Steel size and weight reference charts
- [Metal Trading](https://www.creativemetalind.com/metal-trading): Industrial metal trading service page
- [Blog](https://www.creativemetalind.com/blog): Technical guides for procurement engineers

## Certifications

- IBR Form III-C (Indian Boiler Regulations)
- NACE MR-0175 Compliance
- HIC Tested Plates
- Mill Test Certificates EN 10204 3.1 and 3.2
- Third-Party Inspection: DNV, TUV, SGS, BVIS, LRIS
